What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
S
Sarah M.

Full Care Inc. transformed our backyard with a beautiful paver patio! The team was professional, efficient, and the quality of work is outstanding. We've already had so many compliments. Highly recommend!

D
David K.

We had Full Care Inc. build a retaining wall to address a serious erosion problem in our yard. They did a great job, and the wall looks fantastic. There was a slight delay due to weather, but they communicated clearly throughout the process.

J
Jennifer L.

Our old asphalt driveway was cracked and crumbling. Full Care Inc. installed a new concrete driveway that looks amazing. The crew was professional and courteous, and they finished the job on time and within budget.

M
Michael B.

We love our new outdoor fire pit! Full Care Inc. helped us design a custom fire pit that perfectly complements our backyard. It's the perfect spot for relaxing and entertaining.

Full Care Inc. — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every hardscaping contractor project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The Full Care Inc. Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific hardscaping contractor needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Indianapolis & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Indianapolis, IN and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Carmel Fishers Noblesville Indianapolis Zionsville Westfield Greenwood Lawrence
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our hardscaping contractor services.

What type of pavers are best for Indianapolis weather?

Concrete pavers are generally the most durable option for our climate, as they are designed to withstand freeze-thaw cycles. We can also seal your pavers to further protect them from the elements.

How long does it take to install a paver patio?

The installation time depends on the size and complexity of the project. A typical patio can be completed in 3-5 days.

Do I need a permit for a paver patio?

Permit requirements vary depending on the city and the size of the patio. We can help you determine if a permit is required and assist with the application process.

Built on Indianapolis Values

Ready to enhance your property with a beautiful and durable hardscape? Contact Full Care Inc. today for a free consultation.
